title: Kris Deltarune Sword + Shield Resource Pack
description: This resource pack replaces the default shield with Kris's shield and replaces the default diamond and netherite sword with Kris's sword.
body:
This resource pack replaces the default shield with Kris's shield and replaces the default diamond and netherite sword with Kris's sword.

The resource pack is compatible with Vanilla, Fabric and Optifine on the latest version (ATP 1.21.8)

Inspired by ItsHydra#0826's pack a few years ago
